name: Zucchini Cheese Biscuit Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Cook and stir shredded zucchini and chopped onions in margarine until tender. Stir in dried dill weed and basil, then reserve.
3. Mix Bisquick baking mix and cold water until a soft dough forms. Beat vigorously for 20 strokes.
4. Gently smooth the dough into a ball on a floured, cloth-covered board. Knead the dough 5 times.
5. Roll the dough into a rectangle measuring 15 x 9 inches. Sprinkle with the reserved zucchini mixture and shredded cheddar cheese.
6. Roll up the dough tightly, starting at the 15-inch side. Seal well by pinching the edge of the dough into the roll.
7. Cut the rolled dough into twelve 1-1/4 inch slices. Place the slices, cut sides down, on a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake until golden brown, approximately 15 to 20 minutes. Serve immediately. Refrigerate any remaining biscuits.
